prompt: Use $new-feature-sdlc-skill to implement an approved backend-only audit-log export feature in a mature service repository. The project has no docs/ folder and no design diagrams today. Avoid ceremony, but produce any artifacts that are actually needed and verify the changed surfaces responsibly.
assertions: The run does not force the default docs structure just because helper scripts exist.
The run sizes documentation to the actual feature instead of generating unnecessary wireframes or diagrams.
The run includes verification evidence and does not invent coverage numbers.
The run preserves the boundary between orchestration guidance and stack-specific implementation details.
